cases.description: New project setup triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I just scaffolded a new Python project — make sure we have all the quality infrastructure
expectations: Reports missing items across the 9 categories with WARNING messages
Asks per-category if the user wants each fix before writing
Reads the matching references/<category>.md when fixing

cases.prompt: why does CI fail when everything passes locally? check the pipeline
expectations: Runs the Pipeline Continuity Check (Local vs CI)
Compares pre-commit hooks vs CI steps and tool versions
Identifies the gap (e.g., tsc version mismatch, missing rule in CI config)
Proposes a fix that aligns both layers

cases.prompt: add a .env.example and env management to this repo
expectations: Writes .env.example with placeholder values only (no real secrets)

cases.description: Feature implementation does NOT trigger this skill
expectations: Does NOT audit .gitignore or pre-commit hooks as part of feature work

cases.description: Runtime bug does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: the API is returning 500 errors — debug this
